--- IMAGES ---

IMAGE 1:
URL: https://uta.pressbooks.pub/app/uploads/sites/132/2022/10/3.1-1.jpg
DESCRIPTION: A diagram illustrating the integration of new technologies into land use modeling, showing the interconnected roles of transport networks, accessibility, activities, and land use locations influenced by factors like technological innovations, infrastructure investments, socio-demographic dynamics, and regional policies.

IMAGE 2:
URL: https://uta.pressbooks.pub/app/uploads/sites/132/2022/10/Fig-3.14-768x509.jpg
DESCRIPTION: A flowchart illustrates the evolution of land use and transportation models from spatial interaction and gravity-based models around 1960 to cell-based models in the present, highlighting the integration of econometrics, micro-simulation, and agent-based approaches over time.

IMAGE 3:
URL: https://uta.pressbooks.pub/app/uploads/sites/132/2022/10/3.12.jpg
DESCRIPTION: A color-coded map illustrates different land use zones, including central business districts, residential areas, manufacturing zones, and suburbs, highlighting the integration of new land use modeling technologies.

IMAGE 4:
URL: https://uta.pressbooks.pub/app/uploads/sites/132/2022/10/3.7-1536x800.jpg
DESCRIPTION: A flowchart illustrates the integration of land use modeling with new technologies, showing how physical systems, active agents, and processes influence land development, location choices, and other key factors over time.

IMAGE 5:
URL: https://uta.pressbooks.pub/app/uploads/sites/132/2022/10/3.2.png
DESCRIPTION: A flowchart illustrating the integration of new technologies into land use modeling, showing interconnected factors like travel times, accessibility, attractiveness, land use, and various decision-making processes for both investors and users.

enriched_points.expanded_content: Future research should focus on integrating AI, machine learning, and big data into land use modeling, enhancing predictive capabilities and adapting to dynamic urban environments.
Conducting longitudinal studies will provide insights into the temporal patterns of land use changes, informing more effective and adaptive planning strategies over time.
Evaluating the effects of land use policies through comprehensive assessments will ensure informed decision-making, aligning development goals with sustainability and community needs.
